data.title: EY Upgrades Nightfall With Zero-Knowledge Tech for Private Ethereum Transactions
data.description:
EY's upgrade removes waiting periods and retains privacy-enhancing features while adding near-instant finality over a simplified architecture.
source: https://decrypt.co/313079/ey-nightfall-zero-knowledge-tech-private-ethereum-transactions

data.title: A whale withdrew 2,774 ETH from Binance again, worth about $5.27 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 11 hours ago, a whale withdrew 2,774 ETH from Binance again, worth about $5.27 million. Since February 11, 2024, the address has withdrawn a total of 16,415 ETH from Binance, with a cumulative value of about $43.9 million, with an average withdrawal price of $2,676. The current floating loss has exceeded $13 million.

data.title: BitMart has launched Definitive (EDGE)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart has launched Definitive (EDGE) at 12:00 (Eastern Time) on April 3, and the EDGE/USDT trading pair has been opened.
Definitive is an on-chain trading platform that aims to provide advanced trading tools to the public.

data.title: Elon Musk’s Neuralink seeks patients globally to try its brain chips
data.description:
Elon Musk’s computer-chip brain implant company Neuralink is seeking patients all around the world to trial its device that allows one’s thoughts to control a computer. Neuralink is looking for people with quadriplegia — those who are not able to use their arms or legs — to sign up for a clinical trial, it said in an April 2 post on X, the social media platform also owned by Musk. As of January, Neuralink has said three patients have been implanted with a device. All are quadriplegic and are testing a small brain implant that tracks neural activity to control a computer or smartphone as part of a clinical trial called the Precise Robotically Implanted Brain-Computer Interface, or PRIME study
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/elon-musk-neuralink-seeks-global-patients-brain-chip-trials?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Missing $1.79 million, the whale sold the PEPE position held for two years and made a profit of $427,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, a whale sold 68.76 billion PEPE today in exchange for 271.33 ETH (about 509,500 US dollars), realizing a profit of about 427,000 US dollars. The whale initially opened a position on KuCoin at $82,000 two years ago, and could have made a profit of about $1.79 million if it had been sold at a high point.

data.title: The crypto market fell across the board, BTC fell below $84,000, and only the RWA sector remained relatively strong
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 3, according to SoSoValue data, affected by factors such as Trump's announcement of comprehensive tariffs and the setting of a 10% "minimum benchmark tariff", the crypto market sector fell across the board, with a general decline of about 2% to 6% in 24 hours. Among them, Bitcoin (BTC) fluctuated greatly. After rising above $88,000, it fell below $84,000, falling 1.53% in 24 hours. Ethereum (ETH) fell 3.22% to around $1,800.
It is worth noting that the RWA sector is relatively strong, rising 0.40% in 24 hours, among which Ondo Finance (ONDO), Pendle (PENDLE), and Plume (PLUME) rose 1.80%, 2.34%, and 5.73% respectively. At the same time, the crypto sector index reflecting the historical market conditions of the sector shows that the ssiRWA index rose 0.61% in 24 hours.
In other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 1.10% in 24 hours, and the Layer1 sector fell 2.09%, but Sui (SUI), Cosmos Hub (ATOM), and EOS rose against the trend by 1.99%, 2.17%, and 23.30% respectively; the PayFi sector fell 2.19%, the DeFi sector fell 2.89%, the Meme sector fell 3.72%, and the Layer2 sector fell 3.91%.

data.title: Justin Sun will make a live response to the First Digital Trust incident in a few hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Sun Yuchen’s post on the X platform, fraudsters have been threatening Web3 users, public trust, and Hong Kong’s reputation as an international financial center. He will live broadcast the First Digital Trust-related events on the X platform in a few hours.

data.title: AI Restores Speech to Paralyzed Stroke Survivor After Decades of Silence
data.description:
University of California researchers used a brain-computer interface to turn brain signals into real-time speech.
source: https://decrypt.co/313063/after-decades-of-silence-ai-restores-speech-to-paralyzed-stroke-survivor

data.title: Kraken gains restricted dealer status in Canada, strengthening crypto compliance
data.description:
3-4-2025 – The cryptocurrency powerhouse Kraken has secured its position as a restricted dealer, marking a watershed moment for the nation’s evolving regulatory framework. Following an exhaustive multi-year regulatory process, the cryptocurrency exchange has demonstrated its commitment to heightened investor safeguards and corporate governance protocols. source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/kraken-gains-restricted-dealer-status-in-canada-strengthening-crypto-compliance/
